title: FSCheckpointService.java
description: The FSCheckpointService.java class implements the CheckpointService interface for Hadoop MapReduce, managing checkpoints in HDFS. It uses a FileSystem instance for HDFS interaction, creating temporary files for writing and renaming them upon commit. The service provides methods for creating, opening, committing, and aborting checkpoints, utilizing WritableByteChannel for writing and ReadableByteChannel for reading. It depends on Hadoop's FSDataInputStream, FSDataOutputStream, FileSystem, Path, and CheckpointID, among others.

TITLE: FSCheckpointService.java

DESCRIPTION:
The FSCheckpointService.java class implements the CheckpointService interface for Hadoop MapReduce, managing checkpoints in HDFS. It uses a FileSystem instance for HDFS interaction, creating temporary files for writing and renaming them upon commit. The service provides methods for creating, opening, committing, and aborting checkpoints, utilizing WritableByteChannel for writing and ReadableByteChannel for reading. It depends on Hadoop's FSDataInputStream, FSDataOutputStream, FileSystem, Path, and CheckpointID, among others.
